theme: Cover a network with diminishing overlap
title: Saturating Sensor Placement with Critical Double-Cover Bonuses
strategies: trivial: place all K sensors on the first K node ids (0..K-1), reproducing the checker's naive baseline

greedy: repeatedly add the site with the largest marginal gain to the honestly-recomputed total objective (bonus included) -- optimal for submodular coverage but myopic, so it never invests a critical node's costly-looking first sensor and hence never unlocks its double-cover bonus

strong: build the greedy plan, then explicitly search for BUNDLE swaps -- for each critical node, evaluate its two best-reaching candidate sites jointly against the weakest currently-placed sites, and commit the pair swap whenever the joint gain is positive even though neither site alone would pass; polish with single-site exchanges
invalid: emits K copies of a single out-of-range node id (duplicate + out-of-range) -> must score 0
